commit.message:
conductor: cycle #17 — P2@4000 convergence confirmed, oscillation damping

- P2@4000: bg_FA 0.217→0.204 (safe), avg_P 0.117 matches P1@6000
- Change amplitudes shrunk to 1/3~1/5 of @3000→@3500 — oscillation damping
- truck_R decline slowing (0.269, -9% vs prior -27%), may bottom out
- grad_norm 93% unclipped, stable convergence
- P2 at 67% already matches P1@6000 on most metrics
- Decision: CONTINUE full speed

commit.message:
feat: initial release

MTerm tmux plugin — integrates MTerm (iPhone/iPad SSH client) with tmux.

- Clipboard sync via OSC 52
- Context (git branch + directory) via OSC 1212;context
- Command completion notifications via OSC 1212;notify
- Session management UI via OSC 1212;sessions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: replace PatchTST with XGBoost for swing group (55% → 85% accuracy)

Architecture change:
- PatchTST transformer removed (needed 10K+ samples, we have ~500)
- XGBRegressor with max_depth=4, min_child_weight=15 (conservative for data size)
- Same tabular feature structure as expansion group (proven at 70.3% accuracy)

New swing-specific features:
- IBS (Internal Bar Strength) for entry timing
- rel_momentum_vs_spy_63/252 (cross-sectional alpha)
- copper_ret5 for EEM (China demand proxy via CPER ETF)
- sox_ret5 for EWT (semiconductor supply chain via SOXX)
- Cross-asset already had gold_silver_ratio + real_yield_spread for GLD/SLV

Validation direction accuracy (walk-forward):
  GLD: 85.9%  SLV: 78.1%  EEM: 74.2%  EWT: 71.9%
  (vs PatchTST: 55.4% — near-random)

Top signals by feature importance:
  GLD/SLV: gold_silver_ratio, iv_rv_spread, correlation_regime
  EEM/EWT: correlation_regime, risk_appetite_ratio, credit_spread

Optional ensemble: SwingPredictor blends 70% XGB + 30% PatchTST if legacy
.pt file exists. PatchTST files removed — XGB-only mode active.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(patterns): add Chart Pattern Scanner — 8 classical patterns detected across 50 stocks

Client-side detection of Double Bottom/Top, Bull/Bear Flag, Head &
Shoulders (and inverse), Ascending/Descending Triangle using 5-bar
swing point analysis on 80-day OHLCV data. Each pattern shows annotated
mini-chart, calculated entry/target/stop levels, potential %, risk:reward
ratio, and conviction score. Paginated (12 per page), filterable by
type/pattern, sortable by conviction/potential/R:R.

  · 시스템 카테고리: user_id=NULL, household_id=NULL (전체 공유)
  · 가계 카테고리: household_id=X (가구 멤버 공유)
  · 솔로 개인 카테고리: user_id=X, household_id=NULL (가구 미소속 폴백)

- UniqueConstraint 변경: uq_category_name_user → uq_category_name_scope (name, household_id, user_id)

- category_service.get_or_create_category에 household_id 파라미터 추가
- category_hint_service.get_user_categories에 household_id 파라미터 추가

feat: イベント到着まで copilot session 開始を遅延する (#54)

* feat: イベント到着まで copilot session 開始を遅延する

EventBuffer に waitForEvents(signal) を追加し、CopilotPollingAgent が
promptAsync() を呼ぶ前にイベントバッファにイベントが到着するまで
TypeScript レベルで待機するようにした。
これにより、イベントがないギルドでの空ポーリングによるトークン浪費を防止する。

commit.message:
fix: sidebar indicator not showing + page flash on facilities navigation

Indicator: measurement effect depended only on facilitiesOpen, but the
container doesn't mount until async module/permission data loads. Added
ref callback that sets facilityContainerMounted state, so measurement
re-runs when the DOM node actually appears. Merged two separate effects
into one unified positionIndicator function.

Flash: each maintenance page renders its own DashboardLayout instance,
so AnimatePresence played a fade-in (opacity 0→1) on every mount.
Replaced with a plain div since there's no shared layout to persist
across navigations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

UI improvements: gaps, pill swap, vehicle labels, power-scaled particles

- Add 5px gaps between Sankey bar segments and flow bands for clarity
- Swap pill button sides: charge modes left, vehicles right
- Show vehicle name (e.g. "Enyaq") instead of "Wallbox" in consumer
  bar during active charging
- Scale particle speed and count by total system power:
  0.1kW → slow/few particles, 25kW → fast/many particles
- Fix chargemode: use short-form simpleAPI payloads (instant/pv/stop)
- Add simpleAPI chargemode readback handler for live mode sync
- activeChargeMode getter now prioritizes simpleAPI readback

feat(#275): add task forecasting to predict future resource usage

Add `anvil task forecast` command that projects future task executions
based on cron schedules with support for:

- Chronological schedule projection with --days and --task filters
- Resource contention detection (--contention) using sweep-line algorithm
- Cost projection (--cost) from historical RunRecord averages
- High-frequency task summarization (>50 runs grouped by day)
- JSON output (--json) for programmatic consumption

commit.message:
Add retry logic with exponential backoff for transient API failures

- Retries up to 3x for 429 and 5xx responses with exponential backoff
- Respects Retry-After header on 429 responses
- Network/IO errors are also retried as they are transient by nature
- Logs full error details to stderr for internal observability
- Shows user-friendly messages per failure type (rate limit, auth, server error, etc.)
- Extracts buildRequest() to avoid repeated serialization across retries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix data accuracy using ArgentinaVisaLaw as source of truth

Cross-referenced all visa data against argentinavisalaw.com legal database.
Key corrections: AFIP→ARCA rename (25+ occurrences), removed fictional
"Freelancer Visa" (20 occurrences) and "EU-Mercosur Association" (37+
occurrences), fixed visa costs/durations/income requirements across 7 visa
types, corrected "immediate permanent residency" claims to "2-year temporary
residency (convertible to permanent)", deduplicated 20 nationality entries,
updated tourist health insurance to mandatory per Decreto 366/2025, fixed
Brazil criminalRecord.required to true, and corrected investment minimum
from $50K-150K to $150K.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(browser): use Xvfb in stealth mode + CDP UA override (#71)

* fix(browser): use Xvfb display in stealth mode to avoid HeadlessChrome fingerprint

When stealth mode is enabled and a DISPLAY is available (Xvfb), Chrome now
launches non-headless to avoid the HeadlessChrome user agent string that
aggressive anti-bot systems detect. Also adds CDP-based user agent override
and navigator.webdriver removal after launch, plus --proxy flag support in
the CLI.

* Bump version to 0.1.60
